operations.description: Retrieve full text of a BWB document version as plain text. Defaults to the currently valid toestand. Pass toestandId to select a specific version.

parameters.name: toestandId
parameters.description: Defaults to currently valid version (validFrom <= today <= validTo). Falls back to latest by validFrom if none currently valid.

parameters.name: part
parameters.description: Optional part filter (heading anchors). Multiple values: ?part=a&part=b or ?part=a,b

200.description: Plain-text markdown of the BWB document body.

operations.description: Retrieve the plain-text markdown of a Rechtspraak (Uitspraken) decision. Optionally narrow to a single page with ?page=N.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional 1-based page number to fetch a single page of markdown.

200.description: Plain-text markdown of the decision body.
